assessment.note: Mentoring request has been stalled for three months without pushback — strong growth-stagnation signal.

new_queue.label: Recognition landing
new_queue.name: Did the recognition for the refactor feel genuine and sufficient to you?
new_queue.description: Checks if the recognition for their work was meaningful.

new_queue.label: Billing rewrite role
new_queue.name: How do you feel about potentially joining the billing rewrite next quarter?
new_queue.description: Assesses their interest and feelings about the upcoming shift.

new_queue.label: Current dependencies
new_queue.name: What are you currently waiting on that could stall your progress?
new_queue.description: Identifies waiting dependencies that might not be obvious blockers.

new_queue.label: Mentoring block
new_queue.name: What's blocked the mentoring from happening — your time, opportunity, or something else?
new_queue.description: Explores the reasons behind the stalled mentoring interest.
